# Codex Theme Studio
> Build, preview, and export JSON themes for the OpenAI Codex app—colors, fonts, diffs, and presets.

## Pages
- [Home](https://codex-theme.pages.dev/)
- [Theme builder](https://codex-theme.pages.dev/themes)
- [Docs](https://codex-theme.pages.dev/docs)

## Source
- [codex-themes on GitHub](https://github.com/lafllamme/codex-themes)
